title: Enrolled at Amrita Vishwa Vidyapeetham
description: Started B.Tech CSE with a cybersecurity focus, building fundamentals across programming, networks, Linux, and security practice.

title: Joined Team Hunter
description: Started competing more seriously in CTFs with Team Hunter, focusing on OSINT, forensics, web exploitation, and practical problem solving.

title: Built CTF Competition Momentum
description: Competed in dozens of CTF events and strengthened repeatable workflows for recon, triage, writeups, and teammate handoffs.

title: H7CTF 2025 Finalist
description: Reached finals at H7CTF 2025 hosted by SRMIST and placed 14th among finalist teams.

title: Pragyan CTF 2025
description: Placed 8th at Pragyan CTF 2025 hosted by NIT Trichy.

title: Smart India Hackathon Internal Finals
description: Reached internal finals with wipeITclean, a security-focused project around safer data handling and cleanup.

title: L3m0nCTF 2025 Core Organizer
description: Led infrastructure for L3m0nCTF 2025 using GCP, Docker, CTFd, Nginx, and Linux operations.

title: RedCalibur
description: Building an AI-assisted VAPT automation framework while keeping the scope practical for learning, testing, and repeatable assessment workflows.
